allow: Bash(python3 -c " import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET with zipfile.ZipFile\('Claude Code TDD 工作流指南.docx'\) as z: xml = z.read\('word/document.xml'\) root = ET.fromstring\(xml\) ns = {'w': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main'} for p in root.iter\('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}p'\): texts = [t.text for t in p.iter\('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}t'\) if t.text] if texts: print\(''.join\(texts\)\) else: print\(\) ")
Bash(unzip -p 'Claude Code TDD 工作流指南.docx' word/document.xml)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ID:', d.get\('ID','?'\)\); print\('ServerVersion:', d.get\('ServerVersion','?'\)\); print\('OSType:', d.get\('OSType','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ID:', d.get\('ID','?'\)\); print\('ServerVersion:', d.get\('ServerVersion','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK - ID:', d.get\('ID',''\)[:8], 'Version:', d.get\('ServerVersion',''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ID:', d.get\('ID','\(empty\)'\), 'Version:', d.get\('ServerVersion','\(empty\)'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('v1.43 ID:', d.get\('ID','\(empty\)'\), 'Version:', d.get\('ServerVersion','\(empty\)'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ID:', d.get\('ID',''\)[:8], 'Version:', d.get\('ServerVersion',''\)\)")
